description: Synthetic ASTM E1394 record set (H->P->O->R->R->R->R->L) for one DiaSys R920 basic metabolic panel: four analytes (GLU, BUN, CREA, K) reported as four R records under a single O. Exercises the multi-R-per-O path (LIS-24 / S2.2) — one AstmResult node per analyte, raw code/unit preserved. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.note: Application payload only (CR-separated E1394 records); the E1381 transport applies the STX FN text ETX C1 C2 CR LF envelope + modulo-256 checksum at replay time. A real DiaSys R920 multi-analyte ASTM-HOST capture replaces this in LIS-30 (bench conformance): set synthetic:false with a capture reference.
